arabic:
وعن كعب بن مالك رضى الله عنه قال‏:‏ رأيت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يأكل بثلاث أصابع ، فإذا فرغ لعقها‏.‏‏‏((رواه مسلم))‏
 ‏

english.narrator: Ka'b bin Malik (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text: I saw Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) eating with three fingers (i.e., the thumb, the index finger and the middle finger) and licking them after having finished the food..

chapter.english: The Book About the Etiquette of Eating
